_comment: Merge the 'hooks' block into your Claude Code settings.json (e.g. %USERPROFILE%\.claude\settings.json). Replace the paths below with the absolute paths printed by setup.ps1. SessionStart starts the warm TTS daemon; Stop speaks each finished reply.
